name: Glazed Chicken with Julienne Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned and skinned chicken breast halves
1 large carrot, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1 medium green pepper, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together cornstarch, broth, apple juice, honey, and mustard; set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Brown chicken for 5 minutes on each side, then remove it from the skillet and set aside.
3. Reduce heat to medium. Add remaining oil to the skillet. Stir-fry carrot and pepper until tender-crisp.
4. Return the chicken to the skillet. Stir in the reserved cornstarch mixture. Cook until the mixture boils and thickens, stirring constantly.
5. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. Serve with noodles.
